The '''Outer Javin Company''' ('''OJC''') was founded by [[Ecclessis Figg/Legends|Ecclessis Figg]] and his wife [[Yarith Figg|Yarith]] as the first of the soon-to-be [[Figg conglomerate]]. Headquartered on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gerrenthum/Legends|Gerrenthum]], its main purpose was to chart the [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]] area of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Outer Javin was a highly profitable company, and managed to stay in existence through the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

{{Company-stub}}
